series_metadata.series_description: The Request For Leave RFL Records include timekeeping information for employees and consultants that perform work required for the BWC, and their entries made to use their hours of sick leave, personal leave, vacation leave, military leave and unpaid leave as well as the number of hours used per request.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: three (3) years, provided audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and
